about.title: About Me
about.bio: Passionate web developer specializing in modern and high-performance applications.
about.description: I am a web developer specializing in the creation of modern and performant applications. I master technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, React, and Laravel, with a strong ability to design intuitive interfaces and effective solutions. Rigorous and result-oriented, I am committed to delivering quality projects that meet user needs and current web development standards.
